title: Administer Tactic Types and Delivery Methods

story.so_that: tactic types and delivery methods can be managed and controlled for visibility in the order form
story.i_want: add, remove, turn on or turn off tactic types and their linked delivery methods

journey.before: Administrator navigates to the Tactic Type & Delivery Method section in the admin interface
journey.during: Administrator views a list of tactic types with their linked delivery methods, sees their active/inactive status, and can toggle status or add new tactic types and methods
journey.after: Changes are saved and immediately affect visibility of tactic types in the order form for requestors

capability_breakdown.core_action: Manage tactic types and delivery methods by viewing a list, toggling active/inactive status, and adding new entries
inputs: Delivery method type (Requires Digital Provider, Requires Printer)
outputs: List of tactic types with linked delivery methods
state_changes: New tactic type and delivery method created
Visibility of tactic types in order form updated

ui: Admin Interface (tactic-admin) - Tactic Type & Delivery Method section
List view of tactic types and delivery methods
api: GET /api/tactic-types - List all tactic types with delivery methods

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Administrator sees a list of tactic types with their linked delivery methods in list format
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am an Administrator When I navigate to Tactic Type & Delivery Method section Then I see a list of tactic types with their linked delivery methods
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: View tactic types and delivery methods

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Administrator can see the active/inactive status of each tactic type and delivery method
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am viewing the tactic types list When I look at each entry Then I can see whether it is active or inactive

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Administrator can toggle tactic type and delivery method active/inactive status
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am viewing a tactic type entry When I change its active/inactive status Then the change is reflected in the list

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Administrator can add a new tactic type and delivery method
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am in the Tactic Type & Delivery Method section When I add a new tactic type and delivery method Then it appears in the list
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Add new tactic type and delivery method

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Active tactic types and delivery methods are visible to requestors in the order form
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a tactic type is marked as active When a requestor views the order form Then that tactic type is available for selection
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Make tactic types available for order creation

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Inactive tactic types and delivery methods are not visible to requestors in the order form
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a tactic type is marked as inactive When a requestor views the order form Then that tactic type is not available for selection
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Hide inactive tactic types from order form

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Inactive tactic types remain visible in historical orders
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a tactic type was used in a completed order and is now inactive When viewing order history Then the inactive tactic type is still visible in the historical record

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tactic types with no delivery methods are not shown on the front end
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a tactic type has no associated delivery methods When viewing the tactic types list Then that tactic type is not displayed

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Changes are saved explicitly with a save action in drafting mode
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am making changes to tactic types When I review the settings Then I can explicitly save or discard changes
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Review and confirm tactic type changes

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Delivery methods are unique by Name and Parent Tactic Type combination
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am adding a delivery method When the Name and Parent Type combination already exists Then the system prevents the duplicate

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tactic types and delivery methods cannot be deleted, only marked inactive
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am managing a tactic type When I attempt to delete it Then the system only allows marking it as inactive
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Maintain data integrity for historical records

edge_cases.criterion: Tactic type with single delivery method
edge_cases.gherkin: Given a tactic type has only one delivery method When I mark that delivery method as inactive Then the tactic type should still be visible in the admin list
edge_cases.jtbd: Handle tactic types with minimal delivery methods

edge_cases.criterion: Attempting to add duplicate delivery method
edge_cases.gherkin: Given a delivery method with Name X exists for Tactic Type Y When I attempt to add another delivery method with Name X for Tactic Type Y Then an error message is displayed
Given I rapidly toggle a tactic type status multiple times When changes are saved Then the final state is correctly persisted
Given two administrators are editing tactic types simultaneously When both attempt to save changes Then the last save wins or conflict is detected
Given no tactic types exist When an administrator views the section Then an empty state message is displayed

edge_cases.criterion: Very long tactic type or delivery method names
edge_cases.gherkin: Given a tactic type name exceeds 255 characters When attempting to save Then validation error is shown

questions.question: What is the maximum length for tactic type names and delivery method names?
Should changes be auto-saved or require explicit save action?
What happens when an administrator tries to mark all delivery methods of a tactic type as inactive?
Should there be an audit trail for tactic type and delivery method changes?
How should the system handle deletion requests if deletion is not allowed?

existing_code: Database models for TacticTypes and DeliveryMethods
new_code: Tactic Type & Delivery Method management UI component
List view component with status indicators
Add/Edit form component for tactic types and delivery methods
API endpoints for CRUD operations on tactic types and delivery methods
infrastructure: Database migrations for status fields if not already present
Database indexes on TacticTypes and DeliveryMethods tables

blocked_by: Admin interface framework must be established
Authentication system must be in place
blocks: Any features that depend on tactic type visibility control
Order form features that use tactic types
related: Tactic type filtering in requestor views

domain_knowledge: Tactic type and delivery method business concepts
Data integrity requirements for historical records
stakeholder_questions: What are the specific delivery method types beyond 'Requires Digital Provider' and 'Requires Printer'?
Are there any other attributes for tactic types or delivery methods?
What is the expected volume of tactic types and delivery methods?
Are there any performance requirements for the list view?
